source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The sums of the numbers in the white and in the grey fields should be equally big. Which two numbers have to be swapped so that the sums are equally big? <image1>

image_manifest contains 1 existing image and registry_passed=true
multi_step: question asks which two numbers must be swapped so that two color-group sums become equal
solving requires combining at least visual grouping by field color with arithmetic comparison of sums before/after a swap
there are 5 answer choices, suggesting evaluation among multiple candidate swaps
verifiability: multiple-choice options are provided, so the stated answer can be matched directly to a choice
the target condition 'the sums are equally big' is a concrete arithmetic property that can be checked from the image

risk_flags: exact reasoning path cannot be fully confirmed without inspecting the image
visual configuration of numbers is not included in the text fields
